You are test-agent for task T5: M3-Status-API — State Transition Endpoints.

INPUT (Read these files FIRST):
- PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/2026-03-06-PLAN.md

  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/UserRepository.java
  - C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java
- Test directory: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/
- pom.xml: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/pom.xml

- Log output: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-5.log.md

Task description:
Add state transition endpoints to the existing TaskService and TaskController: PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status and GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions.

ALLOWED implementation files (Worker will MODIFY existing or CREATE new):
1. dto/StatusTransitionRequest.java — NEW: status field (TaskStatus enum)
2. dto/TransitionsResponse.java — NEW: currentStatus + availableTransitions list
3. exception/InvalidTransitionException.java — NEW: for illegal state transitions
4. service/TaskService.java — MODIFY: add transitionStatus(Long id, TaskStatus targetStatus) and getAvailableTransitions(Long id)
5. controller/TaskController.java — MODIFY: add PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status and GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions

Acceptance criteria (M3 spec, 16 ACs):
- AC1: New task initial status is TODO
- AC2: PATCH TODO→IN_PROGRESS → 200
- AC3: PATCH IN_PROGRESS→TODO → 200
- AC4: PATCH IN_PROGRESS→DONE → 200
- AC5: PATCH DONE→CLOSED → 200
- AC6: PATCH TODO→DONE (illegal) → 400
- AC7: PATCH CLOSED→any (illegal) → 400
- AC8: PATCH TODO→CLOSED (illegal) → 400
- AC9: PATCH DONE→TODO (illegal) → 400
- AC10: Successful transition updates updatedAt
- AC11: GET transitions for TODO → ["IN_PROGRESS"]
- AC12: GET transitions for IN_PROGRESS → ["TODO", "DONE"]
- AC13: GET transitions for DONE → ["CLOSED"]
- AC14: GET transitions for CLOSED → []
- AC15: No token → 401
- AC16: Non-existent task → 404

TEST DESIGN:
- Use @SpringBootTest + @AutoConfigureMockMvc for integration tests
- Auth setup: create User in DB, generate JWT via JwtTokenProvider
- Create task via POST /api/tasks first, then test status transitions
- For multi-step transitions (e.g. TODO→IN_PROGRESS→DONE→CLOSED), chain API calls
- Test all valid transitions return 200 + updated task object
- Test all invalid transitions return 400 with error message
- Test updatedAt changes after transition
- Test transitions query returns correct list for each status
- Read READONLY files first to understand existing method signatures and patterns

IMPORTANT:
- Read TaskService.java and TaskController.java CAREFULLY to understand existing code structure
- Your tests should test the NEW endpoints (PATCH /status, GET /transitions) that will be ADDED
- Use JUnit 5 + Spring Boot Test
- Tests MUST fail when run (new methods/endpoints don't exist yet)
- Do NOT create implementation files

OUTPUT: Write test files, return list of paths created.

LOG WRITING (append-only):
[LOG] task=T5 | event=test-design-start | strategy=red-green,boundary,error,contract
[LOG] task=T5 | event=test-design-complete | test-files={list} | test-count={number}

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow M1 (Auth) + M2 (Task CRUD) + M3 (State Machine) + M6 (Task List Page) — full-stack from entity to frontend
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + Java 17 + H2 in-memory + JPA + Spring Security + JJWT 0.12.5 | Vue 3.4 + Pinia 2.1 + axios + vue-router + Vite 5 + Vitest + TypeScript | stateless JWT auth | soft-delete pattern | state machine in enum
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, lowercase packages (com.taskflow.*) | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods, kebab-case file events | TS: PascalCase interfaces, camelCase fields
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] M4/M5 not implemented — M6 uses placeholder for assignee/tags | H2 in-memory (create-drop) | JWT secret in application.yml | all /api/** require auth except /api/auth/** and /h2-console/**
     6→[SHARED] config/SecurityConfig.java | entity/Task.java | service/TaskService.java | controller/TaskController.java | exception/GlobalExceptionHandler.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
    15→[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md

1→[SECTION] API Contract
     2→[VERSION] 2
     3→
     4→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/register | req={username:string(3-50,alphanumeric+underscore),password:string(min8),displayName:string(1-100)} | res=201:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=400,409
     5→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/auth/login | req={username:string,password:string} | res=200:{token:string,expiresIn:long} | errors=401
     6→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/auth/me | req=none | res=200:{id:long,username:string,displayName:string} | errors=401
     7→[ENDPOINT] method=POST | path=/api/tasks | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,default:MEDIUM)} | res=201:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=400,401
     8→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=200:{id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:string,status:string,createdBy:long,createdAt:datetime,updatedAt:datetime?} | errors=401,404
     9→[ENDPOINT] method=PUT | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req={title:string(1-200,required),description:string(max5000,optional),priority:enum(HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW,optional)} | res=200:{same-as-get} | errors=400,401,404
    10→[ENDPOINT] method=DELETE | path=/api/tasks/{id} | req=none | res=204:no-content | errors=401,404
    11→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks | req=query:{page:int(default:0),size:int(default:20),sort:string(default:createdAt,desc),keyword:string?,priority:enum?,status:enum?} | res=200:{content:TaskResponse[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int} | errors=401
    12→[ENDPOINT] method=PATCH | path=/api/tasks/{id}/status | req={status:enum(TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)} | res=200:{same-as-task-response} | errors=400,401,404
    13→[ENDPOINT] method=GET | path=/api/tasks/{id}/transitions | req=none | res=200:{currentStatus:string,availableTransitions:string[]} | errors=401,404
    14→
    15→[SECTION] Shared Types
    16→[TYPE] name=TaskResponse | fields=id:long,title:string,description:string,priority:Priority,status:TaskStatus,createdBy:long,createdAt:LocalDateTime,updatedAt:LocalDateTime?
    17→[TYPE] name=UserResponse | fields=id:long,username:string,displayName:string
    18→[TYPE] name=PageResponse<T> | fields=content:T[],page:int,size:int,totalElements:long,totalPages:int
    19→[TYPE] name=Priority | fields=enum:HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW
    20→[TYPE] name=TaskStatus | fields=enum:TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED
    21→
    22→[SECTION] State Machine Rules
    23→[TRANSITION] TODO -> IN_PROGRESS
    24→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> TODO
    25→[TRANSITION] IN_PROGRESS -> DONE
    26→[TRANSITION] DONE -> CLOSED
    27→[TERMINAL] CLOSED (no outgoing transitions)
    28→
    29→[SECTION] Error Format
    30→[FORMAT] status:int,message:string,errors?:string[]
    31→
    32→[SECTION] Amendment Log
    33→[AMEND] v=2 | date=2026-03-06 | change=added status:enum? query param to GET /api/tasks | reason=M6 spec AC4 requires status filter, was missing from v1
    34→

1→# M3: Task State Machine
     2→
     3→## 需求描述
     4→
     5→本模組實現任務的狀態機管理，定義任務生命週期中的合法狀態與狀態轉換規則。任務具有四種狀態：TODO、IN_PROGRESS、DONE、CLOSED，每種狀態之間僅允許特定的轉換路徑。
     6→
     7→狀態轉換透過專用的 PATCH 端點執行，系統在轉換前驗證當前狀態是否允許轉換至目標狀態。此外提供查詢端點，讓前端可取得指定任務當前可用的合法轉換列表，用於 UI 按鈕的啟用/停用控制。
     8→
     9→CLOSED 為終止狀態，一旦進入 CLOSED 後不可再轉換至其他任何狀態。
    10→
    11→## 驗收標準
    12→
    13→- AC1: 新建任務的初始狀態為 TODO
    14→- AC2: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 TODO 任務轉換為 IN_PROGRESS，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 IN_PROGRESS
    15→- AC3: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 IN_PROGRESS 任務轉換為 TODO，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 TODO
    16→- AC4: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 IN_PROGRESS 任務轉換為 DONE，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 DONE
    17→- AC5: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 將 DONE 任務轉換為 CLOSED，回傳 HTTP 200 且任務狀態更新為 CLOSED
    18→- AC6: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 TODO 直接轉換為 DONE，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request 且包含錯誤訊息說明不允許該轉換
    19→- AC7: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 CLOSED 任務轉換為任何其他狀態，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    20→- AC8: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 TODO 直接轉換為 CLOSED，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    21→- AC9: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 嘗試將 DONE 轉換為 TODO，回傳 HTTP 400 Bad Request
    22→- AC10: 狀態轉換成功後，任務的 updatedAt 欄位更新為伺服器當前時間
    23→- AC11: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 TODO 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["IN_PROGRESS"]
    24→- AC12: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 IN_PROGRESS 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["TODO", "DONE"]
    25→- AC13: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 DONE 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含 ["CLOSED"]
    26→- AC14: 呼叫 GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions 查詢 CLOSED 任務，回傳 HTTP 200 且回應包含空陣列 []
    27→- AC15: 不攜帶 Token 呼叫狀態轉換或查詢端點，回傳 HTTP 401 Unauthorized
    28→- AC16: 呼叫 PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status 帶入不存在的任務 ID，回傳 HTTP 404 Not Found
    29→
    30→## API 端點
    31→
    32→### PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status
    33→- 說明: 執行任務狀態轉換
    34→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    35→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    36→- Request Body:
    37→  ```json
    38→  {
    39→    "status": "string (enum: TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED)"
    40→  }
    41→  ```
    42→- Success Response: 200 OK
    43→  ```json
    44→  {
    45→    "id": "long",
    46→    "title": "string",
    47→    "description": "string",
    48→    "priority": "HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
    49→    "status": "TODO|IN_PROGRESS|DONE|CLOSED",
    50→    "createdBy": "long",
    51→    "createdAt": "ISO 8601 datetime",
    52→    "updatedAt": "ISO 8601 datetime"
    53→  }
    54→  ```
    55→- Error Responses: 400 (invalid transition), 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    56→
    57→### GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions
    58→- 說明: 查詢任務當前可用的狀態轉換列表
    59→- Request Header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
    60→- Path Parameter: id (long) — 任務 ID
    61→- Success Response: 200 OK
    62→  ```json
    63→  {
    64→    "currentStatus": "TODO",
    65→    "availableTransitions": ["IN_PROGRESS"]
    66→  }
    67→  ```
    68→- Error Responses: 401 (unauthorized), 404 (not found)
    69→
    70→## 業務規則
    71→
    72→- BR1: 任務狀態列舉值共四種：TODO、IN_PROGRESS、DONE、CLOSED
    73→- BR2: 新建任務初始狀態固定為 TODO，不可由使用者指定
    74→- BR3: 合法的狀態轉換路徑如下：
    75→  - TODO → IN_PROGRESS
    76→  - IN_PROGRESS → TODO
    77→  - IN_PROGRESS → DONE
    78→  - DONE → CLOSED
    79→- BR4: 除上述四條路徑外，其餘所有狀態轉換皆為非法，應回傳 400 錯誤
    80→- BR5: CLOSED 為終止狀態（terminal state），進入後不可轉換至任何其他狀態
    81→- BR6: 每次成功的狀態轉換必須更新 updatedAt 欄位為伺服器當前時間
    82→- BR7: 狀態轉換不影響任務的其他欄位（title、description、priority 等）
    83→
    84→## 相依模組
    85→
    86→- 依賴: M1 (Authentication)、M2 (Task CRUD) — 基於既有任務資料進行狀態管理
    87→- 被依賴: M7 (Dashboard) — 儀表板需依狀態統計任務數量
    88→

content.text:
Here is the summary of what was done and the files created:

**Test file created:**
- `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/controller/TaskStatusTransitionIntegrationTest.java`

**Log file created:**
- `C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/m1-m2-m3-m6/logs/test-agent-5.log.md`

**Test coverage — 27 test methods across 16 nested classes, covering all 16 M3 ACs:**

| AC | Coverage | Tests |
|---|---|---|
| AC1 | New task status = TODO | 1 test |
| AC2 | TODO -> IN_PROGRESS = 200 | 1 test |
| AC3 | IN_PROGRESS -> TODO = 200 | 1 test |
| AC4 | IN_PROGRESS -> DONE = 200 | 1 test |
| AC5 | DONE -> CLOSED = 200 | 1 test (chained from TODO) |
| AC6 | TODO -> DONE (illegal) = 400 | 1 test + error message check |
| AC7 | CLOSED -> any (illegal) = 400 | 4 tests (TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED self) |
| AC8 | TODO -> CLOSED (illegal) = 400 | 1 test |
| AC9 | DONE -> TODO (illegal) = 400 | 2 tests (also DONE -> IN_PROGRESS) |
| AC10 | updatedAt changes on transition | 2 tests (single + chained) |
| AC11 | GET transitions for TODO | 1 test (checks currentStatus + array content) |
| AC12 | GET transitions for IN_PROGRESS | 1 test (checks [TODO, DONE] in any order) |
| AC13 | GET transitions for DONE | 1 test (checks [CLOSED]) |
| AC14 | GET transitions for CLOSED | 1 test (checks empty array) |
| AC15 | No token = 401 | 2 tests (PATCH + GET) |
| AC16 | Non-existent task = 404 | 2 tests (PATCH + GET) |
| Extra | Full lifecycle chain | 2 tests (chain + field preservation) |
| Extra | Error format for 400 | 1 test (status + message fields) |
| Extra | Self-transition TODO -> TODO | 1 test |

**Test design notes:**
- Follows the exact same pattern as existing `TaskControllerIntegrationTest.java` (`@SpringBootTest`, `@AutoConfigureMockMvc`, JWT auth via `JwtTokenProvider`, H2 in-memory DB)
- Multi-step transitions (e.g., AC5 DONE->CLOSED) chain API calls: first TODO->IN_PROGRESS->DONE, then test DONE->CLOSED
- Tests will fail when run because `PATCH /api/tasks/{id}/status` and `GET /api/tasks/{id}/transitions` endpoints do not exist yet, along with `StatusTransitionRequest`, `TransitionsResponse`, and `InvalidTransitionException`
